message:
fix(opencode): inject gt prime context into system prompt and create AGENTS.md symlink

Cherry-picked from #1646 (andrewboldi). The OpenCode plugin now captures
gt prime stdout and injects it via experimental.chat.system.transform,
fixing agents not receiving their identity context. AGENTS.md is created
as a symlink to CLAUDE.md at the town root so OpenCode picks it up.

Co-Authored-By: Andrew Boldi <andrewboldi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
